rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.183, which governs school district career and technology programs. No overlap in subject matter or fiscal mechanism.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may conduct and supervise career and technology classes and other educational programs for students and for other persons of all ages and spend local maintenance funds for the cost of those classes and programs.
_note: No conflict. Educ. Code §29.183 addresses career/technology program authority; proposed Tax Code change is unrelated.
